Author: thatbigperson
Content: This picture overall symbolizes the human race coming together, not as common enemies, but a species that is able to communicate the greatest form of art. Each colorful brown pixel in this block of soil contains a story, a complex history, if you say, or how it came to covert into a perfect, unrecognixable form of shape. The soft perfect grass represents the exclusivity they are giving towards the other figures, otherwise known as, well, the dirt. The dirt still maintains its basic shape, showing how even when surrounded by others indistinguishable from yourself, you can still stand tall against the racial discrimination against others. And, lastly, rounding out this whole art form, we have the barrier, a wall, however you can learn to call it. The slanted, blue, line pattern all across the border show the uniqueness of each and every one of us, and how we can break that barrier seperating us, and bring us together. In the end, this build shows us the overall strength of us people, how we can be ourselves, stand against prejudice, and break the figurative wall that separates us, and make the overall world, maybe just a perfect planet. And to think you can just see it from this one picture. Heh, a comforting feeling, right? -JamEZ, 7/12/2024

Author: agent_lives
Content: I was banned for a week because I was replacing pride skulls with burgers, because I was making a joke about "burger month." Aurora was the mod who banned me. My IGN for minecraft is HaxxerKiller, and my ingame nick while I was banned was Nuker (rank), JamEZ. I think my ban should be shortened to 1 day, or I should be unbanned altogether. I know that unbanning is probably not an option, but I think really think that a week is too long. I've seen people getting than same punishment as me, even though they did far worse things. The only thing I did was that I replaced a few skulls with another skull, as a JOKE. I feel like that should count as a minor grief/annoyance, not as an entire grief. If you do think it is a minor grief, the ban should be turned into a warn or 1 day ban, because 7 days is way too much. Again, I do not want a full unban, but I would think a 1 day ban would fit better for this punishment.

Author: thatbigperson
Content: Orange is overall known as a complex word in the English language, symbolizes many great things in it's time in the dictionary. Orange has been a color for the longest time, showing up in nature, artificial beings, and other forms of matter. And, surprisingly, the color orange colors the fruit, also named orange. Like lemon, it has a similar citrusy flavor, as well as a similar structure/shape. In the ways that it differs, an orange is very sweet, unlike the lemon, which is sour. A common misconception is that the common tangerine and clementine are called oranges, however, they were actually found to be different, having a different shape. So far, orange has been shown to be a fruit and a color, but it is also a flavor and taste. The orange fruity taste can be made artificially, or naturally. It could become a orange lollipop or an orange juice. Overall, an orange can be interpreted as many different things, and it is one of the most versatile words in the dictionary.
